overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a neon-lit futuristic city street at dusk. The player moves from a covered pedestrian walkway under an overpass, passes pedestrians, and crosses a wide intersection with heavy neon signage and futuristic architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under overpass with construction barriers

events.description: silver van passes by on the left side of the road
approaching and passing a pedestrian walking in the opposite direction

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered sidewalk beneath an urban overpass, passing construction barriers on the right

notable_agents.action: walking toward the camera on the sidewalk, wearing casual clothing

entered.detail: white and red striped temporary barriers lining the right side of the walkway
futuristic cylindrical building with horizontal neon light rings in pink, blue, and green
multiple large digital screens and advertisements mounted on the overpass structure above
tall street light pole with illuminated fixture on the left side of the walkway

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a covered pedestrian walkway beneath a massive urban overpass. The player walks forward along an orange textured sidewalk, passing white and red construction barriers on the right. A futuristic cylindrical building with colorful neon rings rises on the left. Around 11 seconds, a van passes on the road to the left, and at 18 seconds, the player approaches and passes a pedestrian walking in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk with neon advertisements approaching intersection

events.description: exiting the covered overpass area into more open street with increased neon signage visibility
traffic light changes and vehicles begin moving on the multi-lane road

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk past benches and other pedestrians, approaching a large intersection with heavy neon signage

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with purple hair and white outfit walking across the sidewalk

entered.detail: large illuminated billboard displaying 'EL GUAPO' with a stylized animal skull graphic
orange and white public seating benches along the right side of the walkway
elevated pedestrian bridge or monorail track crossing above the street ahead

segments.scene_description: The player exits the covered overpass into a more open urban environment with dense neon advertising. The iconic 'EL GUAPO' billboard becomes visible on the right, while benches line the sidewalk. The crowd density increases with multiple pedestrians visible, and traffic begins moving on the multi-lane road to the left. The construction barriers from the previous segment fall behind as the player approaches a large intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: wide urban intersection with striped crosswalk

events.description: stepping off the sidewalk onto the yellow and black striped crosswalk to cross the intersection
dark sedan drives past from left to right in front of the crosswalk

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection diagonally across the striped crosswalk, moving toward the opposite corner

notable_agents.action: dark colored sedan driving across the intersection from left to right

entered.detail: bold yellow and black diagonal striped crosswalk markings on the road surface
multi-level highway overpass structure visible in the distance on the left

segments.scene_description: The player steps onto a wide crosswalk with bold yellow and black stripes, crossing the multi-lane intersection. The scene opens up significantly with full sky visibility and expansive views of the futuristic cityscape. A dark sedan passes in front of the crosswalk around 48 seconds. The EL GUAPO billboard and benches fall behind as the player moves diagonally across the intersection toward the opposite side, with elevated highways and towering neon buildings visible in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a sheltered urban underpass into a vast, neon-drenched city intersection. It begins on a covered pedestrian walkway beneath a massive overpass, moving past orange textured sidewalks and construction barriers while a futuristic cylindrical building with neon rings looms to the left. As the camera exits the cover of the overpass, the environment opens into a dense commercial district where the lighting intensifies and the iconic EL GUAPO billboard appears alongside increasing crowds of pedestrians. The scene then expands further as the player steps onto a wide, yellow-and-black striped crosswalk, leaving the benches and billboards behind. Finally, the perspective widens to reveal a full view of the sky and a sprawling futuristic cityscape of towering neon buildings and elevated highways.
